# Security Policy

Candela Themes has no runtime dependencies and ships static theme files
(colors and metadata). There is no server, no build-time network access, and
no user data. The security risk is therefore low.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues privately, not as public issues. Use GitHub's
private vulnerability reporting: the **Report a vulnerability** button under the
repository's **Security** tab, or go directly to
<https://github.com/schovi/candela-themes/security/advisories/new>.

This is a single-maintainer project. Reports are handled on a best-effort
basis, with no guaranteed response time (no SLA).

## Supported versions

Only the latest release is supported.
